dimensions.name: Requirements Met
dimensions.gaps_to_10: All 7 requirements fully satisfied: lint exits 0, tests pass (289 >= 289), build exits 0 after clean, all 6 sprite PNGs exist and > 500 bytes, all 5 map API routes return 200, invalid route returns 404, app loads at /.

dimensions.name: Error Handling
dimensions.gaps_to_10: API route has try/catch returning 500 on unexpected errors, 404 for unknown mapIds. SaveSystem intentionally logs parse errors to stderr in tests (expected behavior). Minor gap: no global error boundary in the app shell.

dimensions.name: UX Completeness
dimensions.gaps_to_10: Font loads via next/font/google (no FOUT from raw <link> tags), sprites for all gym Pokemon are present, game serves at /. Minor gap: no loading fallback while game assets are fetched.

dimensions.name: Code Quality
dimensions.gaps_to_10: Zero lint errors or warnings, zero TypeScript errors, all component files well within size limits (largest non-test tsx is 148 lines in tests, 139 in source). API route is clean and idiomatic Next.js 15 App Router style.

dimensions.name: Test Coverage
dimensions.gaps_to_10: 289 tests across 21 files all pass. AssetManifest tests explicitly assert 74, 75, 95 are present. Minor gap: no integration-level route tests in the test suite (API routes are only manually verified).

dimensions.name: Security
dimensions.gaps_to_10: Map API uses a strict allowlist (MAPS record), so arbitrary file inclusion is not possible. No user-supplied data reaches the filesystem. Minor gap: no rate limiting on the map API endpoints.

summary: All 7 integration requirements verified and passing. npm run lint exits 0 with zero warnings, npm test passes all 289 tests across 21 files, npm run clean && npm run build exits 0 producing a clean production build. All 6 gym Pokemon sprite PNGs (front and back for #74 Geodude, #75 Graveler, #95 Onix) are present and exceed 500 bytes. AssetManifest.pokemonIds includes 74, 75, and 95. All 5 map API routes (pallet-town, route-1, viridian-city, pokemon-center, pewter-gym) are registered via dynamic route /api/maps/[mapId] with proper 200 responses and 404 for unknown maps. Font loading uses next/font/google with no raw <link> tags. No P1 issues found; verdict is pass.
